response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience (14+ years) and strong skills in web technologies (Node.js, React, TypeScript) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes). However, the role is explicitly for an experienced C++ developer, and the resume shows very limited, dated C++ experience. Crucially, there is no mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), which are critical requirements for this Senior Manager role. These core technical mismatches outweigh the candidate's general experience and other valuable skills.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (14+ years) and senior-level roles.
Strong proficiency in web technologies (Node.js, React, TypeScript) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
Demonstrated ability to mentor, collaborate, and contribute to development best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Very limited and dated explicit C++ development experience for a C++-focused role.
No mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards.
Lack of explicit experience with IoT application development, REST, and MQTT protocols in an industrial context.
